title: Daily walks and exercise
content: Most dogs benefit from at least two walks per day. Short, consistent walks reduce stress and help with digestion.

title: Consistent feeding times
content: Feed pets at consistent times to support healthy digestion and behavior. Adjust portions based on activity level and age.

title: Medication timing
content: Medication tasks should be scheduled at the same time daily when possible. If a dose is missed, contact your veterinarian.

title: Hydration reminders
content: Ensure fresh water is available throughout the day. Clean bowls daily to reduce bacteria.

title: Grooming basics
content: Short grooming sessions are easier for most pets. Brush in the direction of hair growth and keep sessions calm and brief.

title: Enrichment and play
content: Daily play or enrichment reduces boredom and destructive behavior. Rotate toys to keep interest high.

title: Litter box care
content: Scoop litter boxes daily and fully change litter regularly to reduce odor and stress for cats.

title: Rabbit routine
content: Rabbits should have constant access to hay and regular checkups for teeth and nails.
